gate_interpretation: If this times out, the bottleneck is the base time-domain solve rather than probe count.
If this passes but local probes time out, keep far-field probe extraction separate from Huygens surface export.
If this passes, increase local probe count before retrying the full 96-probe pilot.
If E passes and H fails, keep the E/H export queues separated and inspect H-field probe cost.
Use this as the scaling bridge between 24-probe and full 96-probe local export; the first successful run needed about 15.8 minutes.

Only run this after the lower-cost gates have shown that the base solve and reduced probes finish; the first successful full E run needed about 56 minutes, so future runs need margin. If it still fails, split local probes or change CST solver/export strategy.
matching full local H-field pilot for the completed efield96 row
